title: Tweet by @KanikaBK: Cursor open-sourced Priompt, their JSX-based context-priority prompt library
snippet: Cursor just open-sourced the internal prompt library that powers their $9B code editor. It's called Priompt. JSX-based, assign priorities to every part of your prompt — low priority content drops when context fills up. Scopes, isolation, and inspection built in.
summary: Cursor open-sourced Priompt, a JSX-based prompt library that manages context window pressure by letting you assign priorities to prompt components — low-priority content is automatically dropped when the context fills up. Has scopes, isolation, and inspection built in; battle-tested inside the Cursor editor. Minor — open-source engineering tool, not an open-weight model or local inference research artifact.
